docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BYNUM KIAWA
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-18-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06 TRIAL OF MAY-14-1993 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $472.94 FILED BY RENT-A-CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT BYNUM KIAWA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-14-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RENT-A-CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BYNUM KIAWA $499.54 PRINCIPAL, $54.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $554.04, RETURN 25" SHARP TV SET, 25 WATT SHARP SELF STEREO AND SPEAKERS, 2 HEAD SHARP VCR, BUSH ENTERTAINMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
